_schema.description: BRD §4.8 monotonic-improvement snapshot store. Each snapshot captures the eval scores at a checkpoint; hooks/experiment-logger.js compares latest to previous and decides keep/revert per state/monotonic-policy.json.

snapshot_shape.git_sha: string (SHA of HEAD at snapshot time)
snapshot_shape.diff_path: string (optional, path to the diff that produced this snapshot)
